slate_note: MLB All-Star break — no regular-season games scheduled on 2026-07-13. The pipeline produced zero-game ancillary files (daily_variance n_games=0, provisional_lean games={}, sp_projection games={}) and no picks_2026-07-13_diag.csv was generated. No picks to analyze.
patterns_recognized: F1*-starred picks without F3 ≥ 1000 as a third independent anchor have failed in three consecutive instances (MIL G1/G2 on 7/11, SEA@TB on 7/12); F3_swing_take_gap ≥ 1000 is now required before confirming any starred-F1 pick at GOLD or above.
Stage 2 full-game direction has been correct in every large-delta (≥ 0.12) case across the 7/10–7/12 archive — do not treat Stage 1 lean as an OVERRIDE signal toward the Stage-1 team.

CAP 4 (Stage1/2 delta ≥ 0.12 + confidence_downgrade) produced a false negative on 7/12 COL@SF (pre-cap score=8, SF won 3-1); begin tracking CAP 4 misses on score ≥ 6 stacks for a potential narrow rescue exception analogous to the CAP 10 four-dimension rule.

CLE@MIA four-dimension rescue rule validated twice (7/10: CLE 3-2, 7/12: CLE 5-2); when CLE is the pick side and all four dimensions agree simultaneously (F1+F3+SP edge+PQI+Stage agree), restore to full PLATINUM regardless of CAP 10 bottom-bucket suppression.

D-grade dual-opposing-signal picks (SP xERA against + PQI against) are bet-suppression signals only — directional ambiguity is genuine; never OVERRIDE to the opposing team on a D-grade, only SKIP the model's pick.
